case_title: GE MONEY BANK VS. IGOR PETRYANIK et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE MONEY BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE MONEY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT PETRYANIK, IGOR DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-20-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE MONEY BANK SERVED JUL-27-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PETRYANIK, IGOR
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PETRYANIK, IGOR
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GE MONEY BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETRYANIK, IGOR $3,840.69 PRINCIPAL, $309.75 INTEREST, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,390.44, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
